title: Orichalcum
description: If you end your turn without [gold]Block[/gold], gain [blue]6[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: This relic only triggers if you have exactly 0 block remaining at the end of your turn. The block gain occurs in the BeforeTurnEnd phase, which is very late in turn resolution.
